def match_orders_to_products(orders: list[dict], products: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    products_by_sku = {p["sku"]: p for p in products}
    results = []
    for order in orders:
        for item in order["items"]:
            product = products_by_sku.get(item["sku"])
            if product:
                results.append({"order_id": order["id"], "product": product, "qty": item["qty"]})
    return results


def build_report(events: list[dict], users: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    users_by_id = {u["id"]: u for u in users}
    report = []
    for event in events:
        user = users_by_id.get(event["user_id"])
        if user:
            report.append({"event": event["type"], "user": user["name"]})
    return report
